title: Senior Python Developer
description: We are looking for a Senior Python Developer to design and build scalable backend systems. You will work in an agile team building microservices and APIs.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Join our team as a Full Stack Engineer to build modern web applications using React and Node.js. You'll be responsible for both frontend and backend development.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: We need a passionate ML Engineer to develop and deploy production-grade machine learning models. You will work on NLP, computer vision, and recommendation systems.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: As a DevOps Engineer, you will manage our CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and monitoring systems. Experience with Kubernetes and Terraform is essential.

title: Frontend React Developer
description: We're seeking a talented Frontend Developer with strong React skills to create beautiful, responsive web interfaces. Experience with animation libraries is a plus.

title: Data Scientist
description: Join our data science team to extract insights from large datasets, build predictive models, and communicate findings to business stakeholders.

title: Backend Node.js Developer
description: We need a Backend Developer specializing in Node.js to build high-performance, scalable APIs and services that power our fintech products.

title: Cloud Architect
description: As a Cloud Architect, you'll design and implement enterprise-grade cloud solutions across AWS, Azure, and GCP. You'll lead initiatives for cost optimization and scalability.

title: AI/LLM Engineer
description: Build cutting-edge AI applications using large language models (LLMs). You'll work on prompt engineering, RAG systems, fine-tuning, and LLM orchestration pipelines.

title: React Native Mobile Developer
description: Develop cross-platform mobile apps using React Native. You'll collaborate with designers and backend engineers to deliver polished user experiences on iOS and Android.

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description: Protect our organization's infrastructure and data. You will perform security audits, penetration testing, incident response, and develop security tools.

title: Product Manager - Tech
description: Lead product development from conception to launch. You will gather requirements, define roadmaps, and work cross-functionally with engineering and design teams.
